system.description: You are incapable of being cruel to people, no matter how much they deserve it. You gain a Penalty Die whenever you have to do something unkind, such as trying to kill an enemy. Soft-hearted characters are likely to try to capture enemies rather than kill them (for which they have no penalty). When your soft-heartedness gets you into trouble (you let the prisoner go when he tells you a sob story about his nine children on the brink of starvation, and then he betrays you) gain a Fortune Point.
